title: Meet Kerala's richest minister: Shibu Baby John's ₹24.63 crore net worth surpasses CM Satheesan's wealth
description: Shibu Baby John, the MLA from Chavara seat, has declared net worth of ₹24.63 Crores in his election affidavit filed before contesting elections. Here is the detail of his net worth as declared in the affidavit.
